calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Francisco Torres, Esq. for the Plaintiff: John Stewart Company.
Plaintiff's Witness Mark Capastany was placed under oath and direct examined.
No appearance by Defendant Charles Harshaw.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendant for Judgment as follows:

Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 51 6th Street St., San Francisco, CA. 94103.
Lease agreement is forfeited.
Holdover damages in total of $1,039.12
Costs - $455.00 for a Total of $1,494.12
Judgment was submitted and signed.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Jul-23-2012 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Trinity Management Services is present. Represented by Jackie Lopez.
Attorney Daniel Cheung appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Heath McGrail IS NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of JUL-23-2012 remains on calendar.
